players.name: Jock Landale
players.comment: Apr 2: Landale (ankle) is expected to miss at least two weeks, per Brad Rowland of the Locked On Podcast Network.

players.name: Nikola Vucevic
players.comment: Mar 7: Vucevic underwent surgery Saturday to stabilize a fracture in his right ring finger and will be reevaluated in 3-to-4 weeks.

players.name: Michael Porter Jr.
players.comment: Apr 3: Porter (hamstring) has been ruled out for the remainder of the 2025-26 season, Erik Slater of ClutchPoints.com reports.

players.name: Danny Wolf
players.comment: Apr 3: The Nets announced Friday that Wolf (ankle) is being shut down for the rest of the season, Erik Slater of ClutchPoints.com reports.

players.name: Egor Demin
players.comment: Mar 18: Demin underwent a non-surgical procedure to address plantar fasciitis in his left foot, and there's hope he will make a full recovery in time for NBA Summer League, Brian Lewis of the New York Post reports

players.name: Day'Ron Sharpe
players.comment: Mar 12: Sharpe has been diagnosed with an ulnar collateral ligament tear in his left thumb and will require season-ending surgery, Erik Slater of ClutchPoints.com reports.

players.name: Grant Williams
players.comment: Apr 3: Williams (knee) is out for Friday's game against the Pacers.

players.name: PJ Hall
players.comment: Apr 3: Hall has been ruled out for Friday's game against the Pacers due to a right ankle fracture.

players.name: Moussa Diabate
players.comment: Apr 3: Diabate (ankle) won't play in Friday's game against Indiana.

players.name: Nick Richards
players.comment: Apr 3: Richards is out for Friday's game against the Knicks due to a sprained right elbow.

players.name: Anfernee Simons
players.comment: Apr 2: Simons (wrist) is out for Friday's game against the Knicks.

players.name: Jalen Smith
players.comment: Mar 26: Smith (calf) will miss the remainder of the season, Joel Lorenzi of The Athletic reports.

players.name: Zach Collins
players.comment: Feb 21: Collins will undergo surgery for a sprain right toe and will be sidelined for the rest of the 2025-26 season.

players.name: Noa Essengue
players.comment: Dec 3: Essengue will undergo left shoulder surgery and will miss the remainder of the 2025-26 season, K.C. Johnson of Chicago Sports Network reports.

players.name: Jaylon Tyson
players.comment: Mar 29: Tyson (toe) won't play in the Cavaliers' upcoming three-game road trip, according to Law Murray of The Athletic.

players.name: Dean Wade
players.comment: Mar 29: Wade (ankle) won't be available to play in the Cavaliers' three-game road trip, according to Law Murray of The Athletic.

players.name: Marvin Bagley III
players.comment: Apr 3: Bagley (shoulder) won't play in Friday's game against Orlando.

players.name: Caleb Martin
players.comment: Apr 3: Martin is out for Friday's game versus Orlando due to a right plantar fascia strain, Ron Harrod Jr. of DLLS Sports reports.

players.name: P.J. Washington
players.comment: Apr 3: Washington (illness) has been ruled out for Friday's game against the Magic, Ron Harrod Jr. of DLLS Sports reports.

players.name: Kyrie Irving
players.comment: Feb 18: Irving (knee) will miss the remainder of the 2025-26 season, ESPN's Shams Charania reports.

players.name: Dereck Lively II
players.comment: Dec 21: Lively successfully underwent surgery on his right foot Sunday.

players.name: Zeke Nnaji
players.comment: Apr 3: Nnaji (hip) has been ruled out for Saturday's game against the Spurs.

players.name: Tim Hardaway Jr.
players.comment: Apr 3: Hardaway (knee) is listed as probable for Saturday's game against San Antonio.

players.name: Spencer Jones
players.comment: Apr 3: Jones (hamstring) has been ruled out for Saturday's game against San Antonio.

players.name: Peyton Watson
players.comment: Apr 3: Watson (hamstring) is considered week-to-week, Bennett Durando of The Denver Postreports.

players.name: Marcus Sasser
players.comment: Apr 3: Sasser is probable for Saturday's game versus the 76ers due to a right hip strain.

players.name: Isaiah Stewart
players.comment: Apr 3: Stewart (calf) will remain on the inactive list for Saturday's game in Philadelphia.

players.name: Tobias Harris
players.comment: Apr 3: Harris is questionable for Saturday's game versus Philadelphia due to a bruised left knee.

players.name: Cade Cunningham
players.comment: Apr 2: Cunningham (chest) will be re-evaluated in one week, Eric Vincent of ClutchPoints.com reports.

players.name: Stephen Curry
players.comment: Apr 3: Curry (ankle) is expected to play Sunday against Houston, Shams Charania of ESPN reports.

players.name: Seth Curry
players.comment: Apr 3: Curry (thigh) won't play Thursday against the Cavaliers, Brett Siegel of ClutchPoints.com reports.

players.name: Quinten Post
players.comment: Apr 2: Post is out for Thursday's game against the Cavaliers due to right foot injury management.

players.name: Al Horford
players.comment: Mar 27: Horford is making good progress in his recovery from a right soleus strain and will be re-evaluated in one week, Brett Siegel of ClutchPoints.com reports.

players.name: Moses Moody
players.comment: Mar 24: Moody has been diagnosed with a torn patellar tendon in his left knee, Shams Charania of ESPN reports.

players.name: Jimmy Butler III
players.comment: Feb 9: Butler underwent successful surgery Monday to repair a torn right anterior cruciate ligament.

players.name: Jabari Smith Jr.
players.comment: Apr 3: Smith (face) exited Friday's 140-106 win over the Jazz in the third quarter and did not return, finishing with 18 points (6-16 FG, 4-8 3Pt, 2-2 FT), five rebounds and one steal across 24 minutes.

players.name: Steven Adams
players.comment: Jan 28: The Rockets announced Wednesday that Adams has undergone season-ending left ankle surgery, per Shams Charania of ESPN.

players.name: Fred VanVleet
players.comment: Sep 22: VanVleet suffered a torn ACL and may be out for the entire 2025-26 campaign, Shams Charania of ESPN reports.

players.name: Pascal Siakam
players.comment: Apr 3: Siakam (back) supplied 30 points (13-24 FG, 2-4 3Pt, 2-3 FT), seven rebounds, two assists and two steals in 34 minutes during Friday's 129-108 loss to the Hornets.

players.name: Andrew Nembhard
players.comment: Apr 3: Nembhard (back) is listed as out for Friday's game against Charlotte.

players.name: T.J. McConnell
players.comment: Apr 3: McConnell is out for Friday's game versus the Hornets due to right hamstring soreness.

players.name: Jarace Walker
players.comment: Apr 2: Walker (back) has been ruled out for Friday's game against Charlotte.

players.name: Aaron Nesmith
players.comment: Apr 2: Nesmith (neck) has been ruled out for Friday's game against the Hornets.

players.name: Ivica Zubac
players.comment: Mar 20: Zubac will miss the rest of the season with a fractured rib, Dustin Dopirak of The Indianapolis Star reports.

players.name: Johnny Furphy
players.comment: Feb 9: Furphy was diagnosed with a torn right ACL on Monday and will miss the remainder of the season, Michael Scotto of USA Today reports.

players.name: Tyrese Haliburton
players.comment: Jan 27: Haliburton said Tuesday in his appearance on the "Mind the Game" podcast that he has resumed taking part in 3-on-3 and 4-on-4 work on the court while he continues to recover from right Achilles surgery.

players.name: Isaiah Jackson
players.comment: Apr 2: Jackson (ankle) will be re-evaluated in one week, NBA writer Justin Russo reports.

players.name: Yanic Konan Niederhauser
players.comment: Mar 5: Niederhauser has been diagnosed with a Lisfranc injury in his right foot and will require surgery. He's been ruled out for the remainder of the 2025-26 season, Joey Linn of SI.com reports.

players.name: Bradley Beal
players.comment: Nov 12: Beal will undergo season-ending surgery on his left hip, ESPN's Shams Charania reports.

players.name: Luka Doncic
players.comment: Apr 3: Doncic will miss the remainder of the regular season due to a Grade 2 left hamstring strain, and his status for the playoffs is uncertain, Chris Haynes of NBA TV reports.

players.name: Marcus Smart
players.comment: Apr 2: Head coach JJ Redick said Smart (ankle) participated in an on-court workout Thursday and could return to game action as soon as Sunday against the Mavericks, Dave McMenamin of ESPN.com reports.

players.name: Cam Spencer
players.comment: Apr 3: Spencer is out for Friday's game against the Raptors due to low back soreness.

players.name: Olivier-Maxence Prosper
players.comment: Apr 3: Prosper (back) has been ruled out for Friday's game against Toronto, Michael Grange of Sportsnet.ca reports.

players.name: Walter Clayton Jr.
players.comment: Apr 3: Clayton (hip) has been ruled out for Friday's game against the Raptors.

players.name: Jahmai Mashack
players.comment: Apr 3: Mashack didn't return during the second half of Friday's 128-96 loss to the Raptors due to neck soreness, finishing with two points (0-4 FG, 0-1 3Pt, 2-6 FT), one rebound and one assist across 14 minutes.

players.name: Taj Gibson
players.comment: Apr 3: Gibson (foot) is out for Friday's game versus Toronto.

players.name: Ty Jerome
players.comment: Apr 2: Jerome (ankle) is listed as out for Friday's game in Toronto.

players.name: Jaylen Wells
players.comment: Mar 31: Wells (toe) underwent a successful procedure Tuesday to stabilize his right great toe.

players.name: Zach Edey
players.comment: Mar 25: The Grizzlies announced that Edey (ankle) underwent a procedure Tuesday to address lingering discomfort in his left elbow.

players.name: Ja Morant
players.comment: Mar 24: The Grizzlies announced Tuesday that Morant is progressing in his recovery from a UCL sprain in his left elbow and recently received a platelet-rich plasma injection, though he'll miss the remainder of the 2025-26 campaign.

players.name: Brandon Clarke
players.comment: Mar 24: Clarke needs additional time to recover from a right calf strain and has been ruled out for the rest of the 2025-26 season.

players.name: Santi Aldama
players.comment: Mar 15: Aldama will undergo a season-ending arthroscopic procedure and receive an orthobiologic injection to address discomfort in his right knee, Brett Siegel of ClutchPoints.com reports.

players.name: Scotty Pippen Jr.
players.comment: Mar 13: Pippen will miss the remainder of the season after undergoing a sesamoidectomy to address ongoing discomfort in his right big toe, Michael Scotto of USA Today reports Friday.

players.name: Kentavious Caldwell-Pope
players.comment: Feb 19: The Grizzlies announced Thursday that Caldwell-Pope underwent surgery to address the misalignment of his right pinky finger and will miss the remainder of the 2025-26 campaign.

players.name: Tyler Herro
players.comment: Apr 3: Herro (foot soreness) is probable for Saturday's game against Washington, Barry Jackson of the Miami Herald reports.

players.name: Norman Powell
players.comment: Apr 3: Powell (illness) is out for Saturday's game against Washington, Barry Jackson of the Miami Herald reports.

players.name: Terry Rozier
players.comment: Mar 19: The Heat are planning to release Rozier in the near future, Anthony Chiang of the Miami Herald reports.

players.name: Gary Trent Jr.
players.comment: Apr 3: Trent (hip) won't play Friday versus the Celtics, Eric Nehm of The Athletic reports.

players.name: Ryan Rollins
players.comment: Apr 3: Rollins (hip) has been ruled out for Friday's game against the Celtics.

players.name: Bobby Portis
players.comment: Apr 2: Portis (wrist) is out for Friday's game against Boston.

players.name: Giannis Antetokounmpo
players.comment: Apr 2: Antetokounmpo (knee) is out for Friday's game against the Celtics.

players.name: Kevin Porter Jr.
players.comment: Mar 28: Bucks head coach Doc Rivers told reporters Saturday that he would "be surprised" if Porter (knee) plays again this season, Eric Nehm of The Athletic reports.

players.name: Jaden McDaniels
players.comment: Mar 30: McDaniels is week-to-week with left knee patella tendinopathy and a bone bruise, per Marc J. Spears of ESPN.com.

players.name: Karlo Matkovic
players.comment: Apr 3: Matkovic (back) won't play Friday in Sacramento.

players.name: Bryce McGowens
players.comment: Apr 3: McGowens (toe) has been ruled out for Friday's game against the Kings.

players.name: Dejounte Murray
players.comment: Apr 3: Murray (rest) will not play Friday against the Kings.

players.name: Karl-Anthony Towns
players.comment: Apr 3: Towns (elbow) won't play Friday versus the Bulls, James L. Edwards III of The Athletic reports.

players.name: Alex Caruso
players.comment: Apr 3: Caruso (illness) is out for Thursday's game against the Lakers.

players.name: Luguentz Dort
players.comment: Apr 2: Dort (undisclosed) didn't return to Thursday's game against the Lakers. He finished with 14 points (5-8 FG, 4-6 3Pt), one assist and two steals in 21 minutes.

players.name: Thomas Sorber
players.comment: Sep 5: The Thunder announced Friday that Sorber has sustained a torn ACL in his right knee during an offseason workout, NBA reporter Marc Stein reports.

players.name: Jonathan Isaac
players.comment: Apr 2: Isaac (knee) is out for Friday's game against the Mavericks.

players.name: Anthony Black
players.comment: Apr 2: Black (abdomen) is out for Friday's game against the Mavericks.

players.name: Johni Broome
players.comment: Apr 2: Broome (knee) has been ruled out for Friday's game against the Timberwolves.

players.name: Jordan Goodwin
players.comment: Apr 2: Goodwin (undisclosed) exited Thursday's 127-107 loss to the Hornets in the third quarter and did not return, finishing with three points (1-2 FG, 1-2 3Pt), one rebound and one block across 12 minutes.

players.name: Amir Coffey
players.comment: Apr 1: Coffey (ankle) has been ruled out for Thursday's game against the Hornets.

players.name: Haywood Highsmith
players.comment: Apr 1: Highsmith (knee) has been ruled out for Thursday's game against the Hornets.

players.name: Jerami Grant
players.comment: Apr 1: Grant (calf) won't play in Thursday's game against the Pelicans.

players.name: Vit Krejci
players.comment: Apr 1: Krejci (calf) has been ruled out for Thursday's game against the Pelicans.

players.name: Shaedon Sharpe
players.comment: Apr 1: Sharpe (calf) has been ruled out for Thursday's game against the Pelicans.

players.name: Damian Lillard
players.comment: Feb 14: Lillard (Achilles) defeated Devin Booker and Kon Knueppel in the final round of Saturday's 2026 State Farm 3-Point Contest, taking home his third title.

players.name: Malik Monk
players.comment: Apr 3: Monk (personal) is out for Friday's game against the Pelicans.

players.name: Keegan Murray
players.comment: Apr 2: Murray (ankle) has been ruled out for Friday's game against New Orleans.

players.name: Russell Westbrook
players.comment: Apr 2: Westbrook (toe) has been ruled out for Friday's game against New Orleans.

players.name: Isaiah Stevens
players.comment: Mar 29: The Kings list Stevens out for Sunday's game against the Nets due to right ankle soreness.

players.name: Drew Eubanks
players.comment: Mar 18: Eubanks underwent successful surgery to repair a torn UCL in his left thumb Wednesday and he will miss the remainder of the season, Sean Cunningham of Fox 40 Sacramento reports.

players.name: De'Andre Hunter
players.comment: Feb 20: Hunter is set to undergo season-ending eye surgery, Chris Haynes of NBA TV reports.

players.name: Domantas Sabonis
players.comment: Feb 18: Sabonis underwent season-ending knee surgery Wednesday to repair a torn left meniscus, Shams Charania of ESPN reports.

players.name: Zach LaVine
players.comment: Feb 13: LaVine will undergo season-ending surgery on his right hand after the All-Star break, Chris Haynes of NBA TV reports.

players.name: Emanuel Miller
players.comment: Apr 3: Miller signed a two-way contract with the Spurs on Monday, Michael Scotto of USA Today reports.

players.name: David Jones Garcia
players.comment: Feb 4: Jones Garcia underwent ankle surgery Wednesday and will miss the remainder of the 2025-26 season, Tom Orsborn of the San Antonio Express-News reports.

players.name: Chucky Hepburn
players.comment: Apr 2: Hepburn (knee) has been ruled out for Friday's game against the Grizzlies.

players.name: Immanuel Quickley
players.comment: Apr 1: Quickley (foot) had his first workout without a boot Wednesday but remains without a timetable for a return to game action, Blake Murphy of Sportsnet.ca reports.

players.name: Keyonte George
players.comment: Apr 2: George (hamstring) has been ruled out for Friday's game against the Rockets.

players.name: Isaiah Collier
players.comment: Apr 2: Collier (hamstring) is out for Friday's game versus Houston.

players.name: Elijah Harkless
players.comment: Apr 2: Harkless (hamstring) is out for Friday's game against Houston.

players.name: Lauri Markkanen
players.comment: Mar 19: Markkanen (hip) will be re-evaluated in two weeks, Ben Anderson of KSL News Salt Lake City reports.

players.name: Jusuf Nurkic
players.comment: Feb 23: Nurkic is scheduled to undergo season-ending nose surgery Wednesday, Chris Haynes of NBA TV reports.

players.name: Jaren Jackson Jr.
players.comment: Feb 12: Jackson was diagnosed with a localized PVNS growth in his left knee and will miss the remainder of the season, Chris Haynes of NBA TV reports.

players.name: Walker Kessler
players.comment: Nov 5: Kessler will undergo left shoulder surgery and will miss the remainder of the 2025-26 season, Tony Jones of The Athletic reports.

players.name: Trae Young
players.comment: Apr 3: Young (quadriceps) is out for Saturday's game versus Miami.

players.name: Alex Sarr
players.comment: Apr 3: Sarr (toe) is questionable for Saturday's game against Miami.

players.name: Bilal Coulibaly
players.comment: Apr 3: Coulibaly (heel) is questionable for Saturday's game against Miami.

players.name: Tristan Vukcevic
players.comment: Apr 3: Vukcevic (knee) is questionable for Saturday's game against Miami.

players.name: Tre Johnson
players.comment: Apr 3: Johnson (foot) is questionable for Saturday's game versus Miami.

players.name: Kyshawn George
players.comment: Apr 2: George (elbow) will miss the rest of the 2025-26 season, Chase Hughes of Monumental Sports Network reports.

players.name: Anthony Davis
players.comment: Mar 31: Davis (finger) is healing on schedule and has been cleared for light contact work, though he remains without a timetable for a return, Josh Robbins of The Athletic reports.

players.name: D'Angelo Russell
players.comment: Mar 3: Russell (not injury related) has been ruled out for Tuesday's game against the Magic.

players.name: Cam Whitmore
players.comment: Jan 15: Whitmore has begun the recovery process for a diagnosed venous condition and he will miss the remainder of the 2025-26 season.

espn_players.name: Jaden McDaniels
espn_players.comment: Mar 30: McDaniels is week-to-week with left knee patella tendinopathy and a bone bruise, per Marc J. Spears of ESPN.com.

espn_players.name: Johni Broome
espn_players.comment: Apr 2: Broome (knee) has been ruled out for Friday's game against the Timberwolves.

espn_players.name: Pascal Siakam
espn_players.comment: Apr 3: Siakam (back) supplied 30 points (13-24 FG, 2-4 3Pt, 2-3 FT), seven rebounds, two assists and two steals in 34 minutes during Friday's 129-108 loss to the Hornets.

espn_players.name: Andrew Nembhard
espn_players.comment: Apr 3: Nembhard (back) is listed as out for Friday's game against Charlotte.

espn_players.name: T.J. McConnell
espn_players.comment: Apr 3: McConnell is out for Friday's game versus the Hornets due to right hamstring soreness.

espn_players.name: Jarace Walker
espn_players.comment: Apr 2: Walker (back) has been ruled out for Friday's game against Charlotte.

espn_players.name: Aaron Nesmith
espn_players.comment: Apr 2: Nesmith (neck) has been ruled out for Friday's game against the Hornets.

espn_players.name: Ivica Zubac
espn_players.comment: Mar 20: Zubac will miss the rest of the season with a fractured rib, Dustin Dopirak of The Indianapolis Star reports.

espn_players.name: Johnny Furphy
espn_players.comment: Feb 9: Furphy was diagnosed with a torn right ACL on Monday and will miss the remainder of the season, Michael Scotto of USA Today reports.

espn_players.name: Tyrese Haliburton
espn_players.comment: Jan 27: Haliburton said Tuesday in his appearance on the "Mind the Game" podcast that he has resumed taking part in 3-on-3 and 4-on-4 work on the court while he continues to recover from right Achilles surgery.

espn_players.name: Grant Williams
espn_players.comment: Apr 3: Williams (knee) is out for Friday's game against the Pacers.

espn_players.name: PJ Hall
espn_players.comment: Apr 3: Hall has been ruled out for Friday's game against the Pacers due to a right ankle fracture.

espn_players.name: Moussa Diabate
espn_players.comment: Apr 3: Diabate (ankle) won't play in Friday's game against Indiana.

espn_players.name: Jock Landale
espn_players.comment: Apr 2: Landale (ankle) is expected to miss at least two weeks, per Brad Rowland of the Locked On Podcast Network.

espn_players.name: Michael Porter Jr.
espn_players.comment: Apr 3: Porter (hamstring) has been ruled out for the remainder of the 2025-26 season, Erik Slater of ClutchPoints.com reports.

espn_players.name: Danny Wolf
espn_players.comment: Apr 3: The Nets announced Friday that Wolf (ankle) is being shut down for the rest of the season, Erik Slater of ClutchPoints.com reports.

espn_players.name: Egor Demin
espn_players.comment: Mar 18: Demin underwent a non-surgical procedure to address plantar fasciitis in his left foot, and there's hope he will make a full recovery in time for NBA Summer League, Brian Lewis of the New York Post reports

espn_players.name: Day'Ron Sharpe
espn_players.comment: Mar 12: Sharpe has been diagnosed with an ulnar collateral ligament tear in his left thumb and will require season-ending surgery, Erik Slater of ClutchPoints.com reports.

espn_players.name: Nick Richards
espn_players.comment: Apr 3: Richards is out for Friday's game against the Knicks due to a sprained right elbow.

espn_players.name: Anfernee Simons
espn_players.comment: Apr 2: Simons (wrist) is out for Friday's game against the Knicks.

espn_players.name: Jalen Smith
espn_players.comment: Mar 26: Smith (calf) will miss the remainder of the season, Joel Lorenzi of The Athletic reports.

espn_players.name: Zach Collins
espn_players.comment: Feb 21: Collins will undergo surgery for a sprain right toe and will be sidelined for the rest of the 2025-26 season.

espn_players.name: Noa Essengue
espn_players.comment: Dec 3: Essengue will undergo left shoulder surgery and will miss the remainder of the 2025-26 season, K.C. Johnson of Chicago Sports Network reports.

espn_players.name: Karl-Anthony Towns
espn_players.comment: Apr 3: Towns (elbow) won't play Friday versus the Bulls, James L. Edwards III of The Athletic reports.

espn_players.name: Keyonte George
espn_players.comment: Apr 2: George (hamstring) has been ruled out for Friday's game against the Rockets.

espn_players.name: Isaiah Collier
espn_players.comment: Apr 2: Collier (hamstring) is out for Friday's game versus Houston.

espn_players.name: Elijah Harkless
espn_players.comment: Apr 2: Harkless (hamstring) is out for Friday's game against Houston.

espn_players.name: Lauri Markkanen
espn_players.comment: Mar 19: Markkanen (hip) will be re-evaluated in two weeks, Ben Anderson of KSL News Salt Lake City reports.

espn_players.name: Jusuf Nurkic
espn_players.comment: Feb 23: Nurkic is scheduled to undergo season-ending nose surgery Wednesday, Chris Haynes of NBA TV reports.

espn_players.name: Jaren Jackson Jr.
espn_players.comment: Feb 12: Jackson was diagnosed with a localized PVNS growth in his left knee and will miss the remainder of the season, Chris Haynes of NBA TV reports.

espn_players.name: Walker Kessler
espn_players.comment: Nov 5: Kessler will undergo left shoulder surgery and will miss the remainder of the 2025-26 season, Tony Jones of The Athletic reports.

espn_players.name: Jabari Smith Jr.
espn_players.comment: Apr 3: Smith (face) exited Friday's 140-106 win over the Jazz in the third quarter and did not return, finishing with 18 points (6-16 FG, 4-8 3Pt, 2-2 FT), five rebounds and one steal across 24 minutes.

espn_players.name: Steven Adams
espn_players.comment: Jan 28: The Rockets announced Wednesday that Adams has undergone season-ending left ankle surgery, per Shams Charania of ESPN.

espn_players.name: Fred VanVleet
espn_players.comment: Sep 22: VanVleet suffered a torn ACL and may be out for the entire 2025-26 campaign, Shams Charania of ESPN reports.

espn_players.name: Nikola Vucevic
espn_players.comment: Mar 7: Vucevic underwent surgery Saturday to stabilize a fracture in his right ring finger and will be reevaluated in 3-to-4 weeks.

espn_players.name: Gary Trent Jr.
espn_players.comment: Apr 3: Trent (hip) won't play Friday versus the Celtics, Eric Nehm of The Athletic reports.

espn_players.name: Ryan Rollins
espn_players.comment: Apr 3: Rollins (hip) has been ruled out for Friday's game against the Celtics.

espn_players.name: Bobby Portis
espn_players.comment: Apr 2: Portis (wrist) is out for Friday's game against Boston.

espn_players.name: Giannis Antetokounmpo
espn_players.comment: Apr 2: Antetokounmpo (knee) is out for Friday's game against the Celtics.

espn_players.name: Kevin Porter Jr.
espn_players.comment: Mar 28: Bucks head coach Doc Rivers told reporters Saturday that he would "be surprised" if Porter (knee) plays again this season, Eric Nehm of The Athletic reports.

espn_players.name: Chucky Hepburn
espn_players.comment: Apr 2: Hepburn (knee) has been ruled out for Friday's game against the Grizzlies.

espn_players.name: Immanuel Quickley
espn_players.comment: Apr 1: Quickley (foot) had his first workout without a boot Wednesday but remains without a timetable for a return to game action, Blake Murphy of Sportsnet.ca reports.

espn_players.name: Cam Spencer
espn_players.comment: Apr 3: Spencer is out for Friday's game against the Raptors due to low back soreness.

espn_players.name: Olivier-Maxence Prosper
espn_players.comment: Apr 3: Prosper (back) has been ruled out for Friday's game against Toronto, Michael Grange of Sportsnet.ca reports.

espn_players.name: Walter Clayton Jr.
espn_players.comment: Apr 3: Clayton (hip) has been ruled out for Friday's game against the Raptors.

espn_players.name: Jahmai Mashack
espn_players.comment: Apr 3: Mashack didn't return during the second half of Friday's 128-96 loss to the Raptors due to neck soreness, finishing with two points (0-4 FG, 0-1 3Pt, 2-6 FT), one rebound and one assist across 14 minutes.

espn_players.name: Taj Gibson
espn_players.comment: Apr 3: Gibson (foot) is out for Friday's game versus Toronto.

espn_players.name: Ty Jerome
espn_players.comment: Apr 2: Jerome (ankle) is listed as out for Friday's game in Toronto.

espn_players.name: Jaylen Wells
espn_players.comment: Mar 31: Wells (toe) underwent a successful procedure Tuesday to stabilize his right great toe.

espn_players.name: Zach Edey
espn_players.comment: Mar 25: The Grizzlies announced that Edey (ankle) underwent a procedure Tuesday to address lingering discomfort in his left elbow.

espn_players.name: Ja Morant
espn_players.comment: Mar 24: The Grizzlies announced Tuesday that Morant is progressing in his recovery from a UCL sprain in his left elbow and recently received a platelet-rich plasma injection, though he'll miss the remainder of the 2025-26 campaign.

espn_players.name: Brandon Clarke
espn_players.comment: Mar 24: Clarke needs additional time to recover from a right calf strain and has been ruled out for the rest of the 2025-26 season.

espn_players.name: Santi Aldama
espn_players.comment: Mar 15: Aldama will undergo a season-ending arthroscopic procedure and receive an orthobiologic injection to address discomfort in his right knee, Brett Siegel of ClutchPoints.com reports.

espn_players.name: Scotty Pippen Jr.
espn_players.comment: Mar 13: Pippen will miss the remainder of the season after undergoing a sesamoidectomy to address ongoing discomfort in his right big toe, Michael Scotto of USA Today reports Friday.

espn_players.name: Kentavious Caldwell-Pope
espn_players.comment: Feb 19: The Grizzlies announced Thursday that Caldwell-Pope underwent surgery to address the misalignment of his right pinky finger and will miss the remainder of the 2025-26 campaign.

espn_players.name: Jonathan Isaac
espn_players.comment: Apr 2: Isaac (knee) is out for Friday's game against the Mavericks.

espn_players.name: Anthony Black
espn_players.comment: Apr 2: Black (abdomen) is out for Friday's game against the Mavericks.

espn_players.name: Marvin Bagley III
espn_players.comment: Apr 3: Bagley (shoulder) won't play in Friday's game against Orlando.

espn_players.name: Caleb Martin
espn_players.comment: Apr 3: Martin is out for Friday's game versus Orlando due to a right plantar fascia strain, Ron Harrod Jr. of DLLS Sports reports.

espn_players.name: P.J. Washington
espn_players.comment: Apr 3: Washington (illness) has been ruled out for Friday's game against the Magic, Ron Harrod Jr. of DLLS Sports reports.

espn_players.name: Kyrie Irving
espn_players.comment: Feb 18: Irving (knee) will miss the remainder of the 2025-26 season, ESPN's Shams Charania reports.

espn_players.name: Dereck Lively II
espn_players.comment: Dec 21: Lively successfully underwent surgery on his right foot Sunday.

espn_players.name: Karlo Matkovic
espn_players.comment: Apr 3: Matkovic (back) won't play Friday in Sacramento.

espn_players.name: Bryce McGowens
espn_players.comment: Apr 3: McGowens (toe) has been ruled out for Friday's game against the Kings.

espn_players.name: Dejounte Murray
espn_players.comment: Apr 3: Murray (rest) will not play Friday against the Kings.

espn_players.name: Malik Monk
espn_players.comment: Apr 3: Monk (personal) is out for Friday's game against the Pelicans.

espn_players.name: Keegan Murray
espn_players.comment: Apr 2: Murray (ankle) has been ruled out for Friday's game against New Orleans.

espn_players.name: Russell Westbrook
espn_players.comment: Apr 2: Westbrook (toe) has been ruled out for Friday's game against New Orleans.

espn_players.name: Isaiah Stevens
espn_players.comment: Mar 29: The Kings list Stevens out for Sunday's game against the Nets due to right ankle soreness.

espn_players.name: Drew Eubanks
espn_players.comment: Mar 18: Eubanks underwent successful surgery to repair a torn UCL in his left thumb Wednesday and he will miss the remainder of the season, Sean Cunningham of Fox 40 Sacramento reports.

espn_players.name: De'Andre Hunter
espn_players.comment: Feb 20: Hunter is set to undergo season-ending eye surgery, Chris Haynes of NBA TV reports.

espn_players.name: Domantas Sabonis
espn_players.comment: Feb 18: Sabonis underwent season-ending knee surgery Wednesday to repair a torn left meniscus, Shams Charania of ESPN reports.

espn_players.name: Zach LaVine
espn_players.comment: Feb 13: LaVine will undergo season-ending surgery on his right hand after the All-Star break, Chris Haynes of NBA TV reports.

merged.fusion_notes_zh: 首发以 RotoWire 为准（区分 Confirmed/Expected）。伤停优先级：NBA 官方 PDF > RotoWire MAY NOT PLAY；ESPN 为第三方汇总，可与前两源对照，冲突时以官方为准。
